Work

Create memorable in-person experiences, effortlessly.

D2L — Connection Experience

Book a strategy session
The Brief

Design and execute an event series engaging D2L leaders with customers, building presence regionally.

Challenge

Create memorable event experiences for existing customers, facilitating direct interaction with D2L's leadership team. The goal was to cultivate meaningful conversations that fostered customer loyalty while driving community engagement and valuable feedback.

Solution

A repeatable event format, built for relationship.

We designed and executed a repeatable event format centered around relationship-building between media and D2L — a new brand presence within LatAm — devising a highly strategic, targeted communications campaign to lay a foundation for media engagement and brand recognition.

The Impact

Orchestrated

An initial event end-to-end on behalf of D2L that gathered top educational institutions in Mexico, ensuring seamless execution and success.

Replicated

The event format in various countries, showcasing its efficacy by tailoring it to the local audience.

Built

Relationships with local media, enabling visibility and future public relations campaigns with ease.

More of our work

D2L — EdTech Sessions Experience

An EdTech icon fosters a community of practice.

Anthology — Legacy Conversations

A novel way to engage with Higher Education leaders.
